ssmcontacts.plan.CfnAbout: Information about the stages and on-call rotation teams associated with an escalation plan or engagement plan.

ssmcontacts.plan.ContactId.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the contact.

ssmcontacts.plan.RotationIds.Description: The Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) of the on-call rotations associated with the plan.

ssmcontacts.plan.Stages.Description: A list of stages that the escalation plan or engagement plan uses to engage contacts and contact methods.
